_doc: Station-calibrated official-forecast sources retained as research inputs only. Registry entries are experimental disabled, and live production does not ingest this file. Promote a source only after durable evidence plus registry role promotion.

cwa_township.auth: env CWA_API_KEY (forecast-live plist) or gitignored config/cwa_secret.json — NEVER committed
cwa_township.notes: CWA 鄉鎮天氣預報 (F-D0047-063), Songshan district 松山區 which contains RCSS (Taipei-Songshan), the SAME station the Taipei market settles on (Wunderground RCSS METAR daily-max). Research-disabled until it has durable promotion evidence and an entry-authorized registry role.

hko_fnd.notes: HKO Nine-Day Forecast (fnd). weatherForecast[].forecastMaxtemp.value degC, forecastDate YYYYMMDD. updateTime is the issue/cycle clock. Research-disabled until its evidence is promoted through the same live registry path as gridded sources.
